case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JORGE GOMEZ MORALES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, JORGE GOMEZ $1,852.11 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,957.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,852.11 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, JORGE GOMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED NOV-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, JORGE GOMEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALTIST. DEFENDANT JORGE GOMEZ MORALES DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
